QF.id: III-C Fraudulent and Unfair Trade Practices_12

question.text: Under the PFUTP Regulations, 'Market Participant' includes any person registered under which section of the SEBI Act?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** As per the regulations, 'Market Participant' shall include any person or entity registered under Section 12 of the Act and its employees and agents. **The Trap:** Section 11 deals with SEBI's powers, not registration of participants. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The broad definition ensures that employees and agents of registered entities are also covered by the regulations.
